start.description: Start an HTTP server listening on the specified port

on.description: Register a handler for incoming HTTP requests

get.description: Read the request body from a server into a variable

return.description: Send a response back to the client with an optional HTTP status code
return.examples: return Response to MyServer with status 200

request.description: The HTTP method of the current request (GET, POST, etc.)

path.description: The URL path of the current request

body.description: The body content of the current request
